announcements.title: New Feature: Screen Sharing Enhancement
announcements.content: We've improved screen sharing quality and added annotation tools. Try it in your next meeting!

announcements.title: Scheduled Maintenance
announcements.content: We'll be performing scheduled maintenance on Jan 20, 2025 from 2AM to 4AM UTC. Some features may be unavailable during this time.

announcements.title: Tip: Keyboard Shortcuts
announcements.content: Press 'M' to mute/unmute and 'V' to toggle video during meetings for quicker control.
